name: Flowable
description: Flowable — open-source BPMN, CMMN, and DMN workflow engine with Java runtime. Enterprise edition adds low-code modeler and cloud deployment.

seo.title: Flowable — Data Integration / ETL / Reverse ETL
seo.meta_description: Flowable: Flowable — open-source BPMN, CMMN, and DMN workflow engine with Java runtime. Enterprise edition adds low-code modeler and cloud deployment.

when_to_use: BPMN, CMMN, and DMN workflow engine embedded in Java apps
Low-code process modeling with enterprise workflow automation
Case management workflows for adaptive process handling
Decision table execution with DMN for business rules engines
Open-source BPM alternative to Camunda for Java teams

pros: BPMN, CMMN, and DMN in one engine
Active fork with more momentum than Activiti
Java runtime embeds cleanly into apps
cons: Enterprise features gated behind commercial license
UI still feels enterprise-Java in places
Modern competitors like Camunda 8 went cloud-native
review.verdict: Strongest self-hosted BPMN alternative to Camunda 7, trailing Camunda 8's cloud-native direction.
review.best_for: Java shops wanting embedded BPMN with optional enterprise modeler
review.not_for: Teams wanting cloud-native BPM without running Java runtimes

pricing.high_water_mark_reason: Freemium tier; no explicit peak-lock or reserved-capacity evidence.
